search_results.title: Claude Mythos Preview System Card - anthropic.com
search_results.snippet: This System Card describes Claude Mythos Preview, a large language model from Anthropic. Claude Mythos Preview is our most capable frontier model to date, and shows a striking leap in scores on many e...

search_results.title: Claude Mythos Preview: Benchmarks, Pricing & Project Glasswing
search_results.snippet: Anthropic's unreleased Claude Mythos Preview scores 93.9% on SWE-bench Verified, 94.6% on GPQA Diamond, and found thousands of zero-day vulnerabilities across every major OS and browser.
